product_brief: A cryptographic intelligence platform that illuminates hidden encryption risks and guides the transition to post-quantum security.
pqc_support: Yes (guides the transition to post-quantum security)
pqc_capability_description: The platform is designed to illuminate hidden encryption risks and guide organizations through the transition to post-quantum security. It maps cryptographic risk across infrastructure, vendors, and supply chains using structured models and visualizations. No specific PQC algorithms or implementation maturity levels are stated.
